title: animators artists of the series
wikitext:
[]: animators/artists of the series             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Nov 30, 2004 10:27 pm which were the animators/artists for the episodes of the blackout and volcano episodes? the style seems inconsistent with sadamoto's....

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Tue Nov 30, 2004 10:50 pm there's tons of animators throughout Eva. some fans are good enough that they can pick out individual animator's styles, but this is easier is a series like FLCL where artists were free to experiment with radical styles. The style of Eva is pretty consistent throughout... I actually don't think Sadamoto did any key animation for Eva, did he?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 2:41 pm I dont think so i think he just did a little here <--- and a little There --------^

[]: Re: animators/artists of the series             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Dec 01, 2004 4:05 pm sadsadshinji wrote: which were the animators/artists for the episodes of the blackout and volcano episodes? the style seems inconsistent with sadamoto's....

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 09, 2004 5:10 pm Thought I would point these out, as they list who storyboarded and did animation for the episodes. http://www.evamonkey.com/platinum_vol1_episode_commentary.htm http://www.evamonkey.com/platinum_vol2_episode_commentary.htm http://www.evamonkey.com/platinum_vol3_episode_commentary.htm

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 10, 2004 1:07 am "Data of Evangelion" has the credits for every episode. (I got mantra's scans if anyone wants 'em...) Unfortunately, it IS all in Japanese... :P

The style of Eva is pretty consistent throughout... I actually don't think Sadamoto did any key animation for Eva, did he?
